name: ASRock B650E PG-ITX WiFi Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - eDP 1.4 - Killer 2.5G LAN - Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C (Front)
